title: HexText
description: A Hex Casting addon which allows you to use Raw JSON text format by hex
body:
The Raw JSON text is the format Minecraft uses to display rich text, but you can't use it without cheats, this addon adds several patterns that allow you to parse this format from a string (requires moreiotas) and use it to rename entities or items.


Want a more hex way? try [hexstuff](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexstuff)
